label: plain_text
text:
(i)
1936 is between 1600 (40") and 2500 (50"), s0 40 < √1936 < 50.
(ii)
The last digit of 1936 is 6. So, the last digit of the square root
must either be 4 or 6. It can be 44 or 46.
(iii)
If we calculate 45?, we can compare it with 1936 to halve
the interval to search from 40-50 to either 40-45 or 45-50.
We can write 45² as (40 + 5) (40 + 5) = 40² + 2 x 40 × 5 + 52
= 1600 + 400 + 25 = 2025.
(iv)
2025 > 1936. S0, 40 < √1936 < 45
(v)
From the observation in point b we can guess and then verify
that √1936 is 44.
